Themeable Home Components Docs

CSS Variables Theming Demo

This site uses CSS custom properties for theming. Click "Toggle Theme" in the nav to switch between light and dark modes.

Card One

All colors on this page reference CSS variables, making theme switching instant.

Card Two

The extension should not conflict with these custom properties.

Card Three

Each variable maps to a specific design token in the system.
